batch_metadata.note: Pre-hot-period batch immediately preceding B-017 August 2024 anchor. Contains ROW-5808 stop command — confirmed Eli compliance, not RF-07 against Eli.

unflagged_notable.message_text: ROW-5808 (Received): 'Now shut the fuck up and leave me alone'
unflagged_notable.assessment: Melissa's stop command — explicit 'leave me alone' directive. Per ADD-003 calibration, this would constitute a stop signal triggering the continuation-after-stop rule if Eli continued. RF-04 batch record confirms Eli stopped responding after ROW-5808 (contemptuous dismissal following Eli's explanation). ADD-002 and ADD-003 apply: (1) Eli complied — NOT RF-07 against Eli; (2) Melissa's own RF-04 primary flag for contempt (ROW-5808 is ARC-RF04-001 signal). Directional calibration note: ROW-5808 is a Melissa stop-command that Eli respected. No continuation-after-stop signal generated here.
